# IncentEdge — IRA Tax Credit Intelligence Platform
# https://incentedge.com

## About
IncentEdge is an AI-powered SaaS platform for discovering, applying for, and monetizing IRA (Inflation Reduction Act) tax credits and clean energy incentives. We cover 217,000+ federal, state, and local programs.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://incentedge.com
- Incentive Database: https://incentedge.com/incentives
- Federal Credits: https://incentedge.com/incentives/federal
- Developer API: https://incentedge.com/developers
- Pricing: https://incentedge.com/pricing
- IRA Guide: https://incentedge.com/resources/ira-guide

## Coverage
Federal programs: Section 45L, 179D, ITC, PTC, 48C, 45Q, 45V, LIHTC, NMTC, PACE
State programs: All 50 states
Total programs: 217,000+

## Target Users
- Clean energy developers
- Finance teams and tax equity investors
- Real estate developers
- Engineering, procurement, and construction firms
